ops.title: cc-squash design state: the live-continuous proxy architecture (supersedes the old boundary-hook plan) + where every research deliverable lives.
ops.body:
Research into Claude Code compaction is complete and has evolved into a concrete architecture (2026-06-20). Build state as of 2026-07-14 lives in [[cc-squash-layer4-build]] (full deterministic recode chain landed; encoding passes on [[format-core]]).

Deliverables in `.claude/research/`:
- `compaction-deep-dive.md` — how CC compaction works + complaint clusters + prior-art taxonomy. §0–§3 still valid; **§4/§5 SUPERSEDED** by the architecture doc.
- `cc-squash-architecture.md` — THE design (9.4k words, judge-passed): live continuous cache-economics optimizer.
- `transcript-reload-feasibility.md` — mechanism RE memo (force-reload + compaction-replace, confirmed-from-binary).
- `mechanism-followups.md` — cooperative-reload (`--resume`), in-memory (dead end), and the **summarization-response proxy v0** verdicts.
- `eval-strand-{e1..e5}.json` + (pending) `eval-methodology-deep-dive.md` — how to rigorously prove cc-squash beats built-in compaction (88 findings; synthesis still to run).
- `cc-squash-build-plan.md` — THE BUILD PLAN (8.4k words, judge-passed): a **Rust** auto-launching `ccs` daemon (`ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=$(ccs url) ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=true claude`), maximally-safe (fail-open RelayCore + sandboxed Interceptor + shadow mode), with §3 = the concrete compaction algorithm (bioqa `ContentDecision` + structured-`WorkingState`/Rsum summarizer + dedup-with-backref + two-layer budget + L1/L2 NPV gate, bioqa file:line verified). Crates: pingora/tokio/rustls/serde/tokio-rusqlite/rmcp/fuser/dashmap/cargo-dist. Milestones M0 daemon+RelayCore passthrough → M1 v0 summarization proxy → M2 shadow+eval/replay → M3 reversible-ref store+MCP → M4 cache-economics scorer+live rewriting → M5 cooperative-reload+content-replacement+FUSE+hook sidecar. **LANGUAGE PIVOT: Rust supersedes the Python scaffold.** Hooks verdict: proxy SUBSUMES all mutation; sidecar is RECOMMENDED-not-required, observe-only (correlation/capture/UX).

**Design direction (CURRENT — supersedes the old "two hooks: PreCompact capture + SessionStart re-inject" plan):**
cc-squash is a **LIVE, CONTINUOUS cache-economics optimizer**, NOT a compaction-boundary hook. Built as a **streaming proxy at `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`** that rewrites every `/v1/messages` request: scores keep-vs-evict per context segment, pricing **every squash against the one-time cost of busting the Anthropic prefix cache** (tail edits cheap, head edits expensive, *free* when the cache is cold past TTL) vs. recurring per-turn savings. Squashes are **reversible** — content-addressed durable store, dual retrieval (MCP `retrieve()` tool + FUSE path), lazy-materialized. Ports bioqa's always-on tradeoff + lossy ladder; a strict superset of headroom's reversible cache. Hooks survive only as a decoupled recovery/control sidecar (`SessionStart(matcher:'compact')` re-injection; `PreCompact` `blockedBy`).

**The mechanism is settled BY THE BINARY, not by preference:** the proxy is load-bearing. Both transcript-rewrite and PreCompact-replace are **DEAD (confirmed-from-binary)**, and in-memory manipulation is closed by an anti-debug kill-switch — see [[cc-compaction-internals]]. **Ship-first v0 = a summarization-response proxy** that intercepts only CC's compaction call (uniquely matchable) and synthesizes a structured summary — improves compaction quality, validates the proxy harness, reuses into the continuous engine. A cooperative `--resume` after in-place `.jsonl` edits is a free-bust context-reduction tier. C5 ("continue without asking") inversion remains the highest-leverage UX fix, now delivered via SessionStart re-injection. Targets complaints C1 context-loss, C2 fires-mid-task, C3 no-recovery, C4 no-control, C5.
